title: Dragon Seed
writer: Pearl S. Buck, Marguerite Roberts, Jane Murfin
actors: Katharine Hepburn, Walter Huston, Aline MacMahon
plot: The lives of a small Chinese village are turned upside down when the Japanese invade it, and a heroic young woman leads her fellow villagers in an uprising against these invaders.
awards: Nominated for 2 Oscars. 3 wins & 2 nominations total
